en: Does your organization have database and authentication settings for the database and application that supports the systems (e.g., password length requirements, password expiration intervals, account lockout settings, etc.)?
Does your organization have an Access Control Policy and Procedures?
Does your organization have a system listing of network, database and application administrators / super users for the network, database and application that supports the systems under review?

Does your organization have network, database and application access control list / user listing with assigned access levels / roles for the network, database and application that supports the systems?

Does your organization have a system-generated network, database and application directory permissions showing access rights associated with each group or role for the network, database and application that supports the systems?
Does your organization have a description of your firewall systems?
Does your organization maintain physical and logical network diagrams inclusive of firewalls protecting the production servers?
Full rules set is not required; please provide at a minimum the IP address range for the production network(s) and traffic access rules into and out of the production network segment(s)
Does your organization have firewall rules set that demonstrate that the system is in place and configured to block certain traffic?
Does your organization have a description of encryption mechanisms in place to protect data transmission?
If shared accounts are used please provide individuals name's and job titles that have knowledge of user ID and password
Does your organization have a listing of employees with the ability to authenticate and to administer the firewall?
Does your organization have an Intrusion Prevention System?
Does your organization have a description of the anti-virus systems utilized? This includes a description of the systems that are protected.
Can your organization provide system-generated screen prints from anti-virus server showing the update and distribution settings for each production server?
Can your organization provide screenshots from the anti-virus server showing current virus definition level and antivirus version number?
Does your organization have written policies regarding software updates/revisions that are done periodically.
Does your organization have a description of the physical security system (i.e., nature and extent of audible alarms, motion detectors, cameras, glass breakage sensors, etc.)?
Does your organization maintain a system-generated access control list for the badge access system administration? (i.e. who can change access card rights)
Does your organization maintain a system-generated badge access listing with zone assignments?
Does your organization maintain a system-generated badge access system log demonstrating that successful and unsuccessful access attempts are logged?
Does your organization have a list of all current employees including titles?
Does your organization have a list of all new employees hired during the review period?
Does your organization have list of all terminated employees during the review period?
Does your organization have a hiring checklist?
Does your organization require all employees to sign an employee code of conduct upon hire?
Does your organization complete criminal background checks for new hires?
Is your organization a software provider?
Does your organization have a Change Management Policy and Procedure?
Does your organization have a system generated list of all changes from the ticket system that affects the system security?

Does your organization have evidence that changes/upgrades that were made to the security system were reviewed and approved by the Change Control Board and documented in ChangeGear prior to migrating to the production environment?
Does your organization have evidence that OS (Operating System) and DB (Database) changes to client's production environment was approved prior to migrating into the production systems?
Does your organization have a system generated list of all emergency changes that were made to the security system during the review period?
Does your organization have evidence of after the fact approvals on a sample of emergency changes made to the security system?
Does your organization have an Information Security Policy and Procedures document?
Does IT Management review your organization's Security Policy annually?
Does your organization have a system description with all its boundaries?
Does your organization have IT resource guidelines?
Does your organization have an Acceptable Use Policy?
Does your organization have a copy of use policy and / or Non Disclosure agreement for employees and contractors/suppliers with any level of access?
Has your organization had any security breaches in the past 12 months?
Does your organization have a Security Awareness Training program?
Does your organization attend IT Security conferences and webinars?
Has your organization performed a Risk Assessment to identify and assess the risks associated with your system's security?
Has your organization undergone a penetration test in the last 12 months?
Does your organization have a data classification policy and procedures?
Does your organization have a system in place to remote manage devices?
Does your organization have a policy regarding Personal Device Usage?
Does your organization have a Data Retention Policy?
Does your organization have an incident response policy and procedure?
Does your organization have an incident log for all incidents that happened during the review period?
Does your organization have a Confidentiality policy and procedure?
Does your organization have a Data Transmission policy?
Does your organization allow employees to use personal devices?
Does your organization allow contractors to use personal devices?

If yes, does your organization have a way to ensure that all employee information is deleted from the device(s) in the event that employment is terminated or they no longer are working with your organization?

If yes, how does your organization have a way to ensure that all contractors/contractor employees' information is deleted from the device(s) in the event that employment is terminated or they no longer are working with your organization?
Does your organization require Non Disclosure Agreements to be signed with third parties?
